title: Special Education Mild/Moderate Teacher (Part Time)
status: Part Time, .5 FTEMinimum Requirements:An Active Utah Special Education K-12 License.  Mild/Moderate Support Needs Endorsement preferred.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule.
